headline: Kediri flood disrupts drainage service in dense neighborhoods
summary: Banjir di Kediri menyebabkan genangan permukiman dan gangguan layanan drainase pada beberapa lingkungan padat.
summary_id: Banjir di Kediri menyebabkan genangan permukiman dan gangguan layanan drainase pada beberapa lingkungan padat.
summary_en: Flooding in Kediri caused residential inundation and drainage service disruption in several dense neighborhoods.
